summary: Iteration 275 - Rule of Nines Zero Point System Testing. CRITICAL ISSUE: Zero Point (gravity 0.48-0.52) is UNREACHABLE because no gravity slider exists. The main agent mentioned 'gravity slider in UtilityDock' but this feature was NOT implemented. Gravity is route-based only (Hollow=23%, Core=71%, Matrix=97%), none of which fall in Zero Point range. Working features: STOP button VOID activation, UtilityDock expansion, HexagramCompass with 6 lines, layer labels.

critical.issue: MISSING GRAVITY SLIDER - Main agent stated 'gravity slider is inside UtilityDock' but NO slider exists. Gravity is route-based only.
critical.impact: Zero Point features (flicker, hexagram ghost layer, source state) cannot be triggered

critical.issue: Zero Point range (0.48-0.52) is mathematically unreachable. Route depths (0.15, 0.5, 0.85) translate to gravities (0.23, 0.71, 0.97) via sin(depth * π/2)
critical.impact: All Zero Point features are dead code - cannot be activated

integration_issues.issue: ZeroPointExperience, HexagramGhostLayer, useZeroPointFlicker hooks exist but cannot be triggered

action_items: CRITICAL: Add gravity slider to UtilityDock to allow manual gravity control (0.0-1.0 range)
OR: Add a route/page with depth ~0.33 to naturally reach Zero Point gravity (0.48-0.52)
OR: Add a 'Zero Point Mode' toggle button that forces gravity to 0.50
Add data-testid='tiered-navigation' to TieredNavigation component if it exists
Consider adding data-testid='gravity-slider' for the new slider
critical_code_review_comments: languageRegistry.js: Well-structured 9 languages with haptic profiles, phonetic synthesis params - CODE IS GOOD but UNTESTABLE
hexagramRegistry.js: 9 Master Controller hexagrams with binary patterns, SVG generation - CODE IS GOOD but UNTESTABLE
useZeroPointFlicker.js: Gravity-reactive flicker logic with Source State detection at 0.5000 - CODE IS GOOD but UNTESTABLE
usePhoneticSynthesizer.js: Web Audio API synthesis with granular noise, tonal glides - CODE IS GOOD but UNTESTABLE
HexagramGhostLayer.js: 3x3 grid SVG rendering with Source State overlay - CODE IS GOOD but UNTESTABLE
ZeroPointExperience.js: Orchestrator component - CODE IS GOOD but UNTESTABLE
PolarityContext.js: ISSUE - calculateGravity uses sin(depth * π/2) which makes Zero Point unreachable with current depths

success_rate.frontend: 40% - Core UI works but Zero Point features untestable

context_for_next_testing_agent: CRITICAL: Zero Point system code exists but cannot be triggered. Need gravity slider or route with depth ~0.33. Working: STOP button (data-testid='emergency-shutoff'), UtilityDock (data-testid='utility-dock'), HexagramCompass (data-testid='hexagram-compass'), hexagram lines (data-testid='hexagram-line-0' through 'hexagram-line-5'). Gravity values: Hollow=23%, Core=71%, Matrix=97%. Zero Point needs 48-52%.
